name: File-platine_s3_key
label: S3 Object Key
description: S3 object key written by Platine on every upload, migration, or privacy change. Used for reliable deletion without URL parsing. Do not edit manually.

name: File-platine_s3_thumbnail_key
label: S3 Thumbnail Key
description: S3 object key for the thumbnail generated by Platine on image upload. Used for reliable thumbnail deletion. Do not edit manually.
